code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut evens = ""
  mut odds = ""
  mut even_count = 0
  mut odd_count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if even_count == 0
            evens = "#{v}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
          even_count = even_count + 1
        else
          if odd_count == 0
            odds = "#{v}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
          odd_count = odd_count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("evens=#{evens}")
  println("odds=#{odds}")
end
